title: SPARC Cat Acute UroMOCA Implantation
author: Anna Rietsch
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bf2kjqcw
materials: Transport cat from housing site to surgery site.
Cleveland Clinic animal team euthanizes the animal

steps.title: Animal is anesthetized and abdomen is...
steps.instruction: Animal is anesthetized and abdomen is shaved by the vet team. The cat is then moved into the surgery room and attached to monitors by the vet team.

steps.title: Drape animal and perform betadine scrub on abdomen and genitals
steps.instruction: Drape animal and perform betadine scrub on abdomen and genitals.

steps.title: Put surgilube on 3
steps.instruction: Put surgilube on 3.5Fr catheter and insert into bladder through the urethra. Advance the catheter until resistance is met, then pull back 2-3cm.

steps.title: Use gentle suction with syringe to...
steps.instruction: Use gentle suction with syringe to withdraw urine from bladder through the catheter. Measure the volume and save the urine for urinalysis. 7 mL urine removed Conductivity of urine was recorded before sending for urinalysis 40.78 mS/cm 41.54 mS/cm 41.52 mS/cm

steps.title: Use 1:10 dilution of contrast to saline to visualize bladder
steps.instruction: Use 1:10 dilution of contrast to saline to visualize bladder. Fill the bladder with contrast and take a 3D CT image Add 10 mL more to bladder take 3D CT image

steps.title: Performed after cat is transferred from Isoflurane to propofol anesthetic
steps.instruction: Performed after cat is transferred from Isoflurane to propofol anesthetic. Fill rate is 2ml saline/minute using syringe pump. Data is recorded using Labview software. Pressure is recorded using an external pressure transducer connected to syringe pump on one end and tubing that leads to the catheter on the other end.

steps.title: Fill bladder with saline and record...
steps.instruction: Fill bladder with saline and record pressure using pressure transducer connected to LabView Fill to 15 mL

steps.title: Empty Bladder Remove 17 ml of saline + urine
steps.instruction: Empty Bladder Remove 17 ml of saline + urine

steps.title: See protocol titled "SPARC Cat surgery...
steps.instruction: See protocol titled "SPARC Cat surgery Day 0" for details on accessing and opening the bladder for device insertion.

steps.title: 1 cm incision made in bladder
steps.instruction: 1 cm incision made in bladder. Place device in bladder, with the wires for power remaining outside the bladder. Suture the bladder closed, check for leaks and place bladder back into body.

steps.title: Close the abdomen, with the wires...
steps.instruction: Close the abdomen, with the wires for power remaing outside of the animal

steps.title: Fill bladder with saline at 2ml/minand...
steps.instruction: Fill bladder with saline at 2ml/minand record pressure using pressure transducer connected to LabView Fill to 12 mL ; No spontaneous contractions seen Fill to 15 mL ; Pressure response from UroMOCA is seen

steps.title: Fill bladder with saline and record...
steps.instruction: Fill bladder with saline and record pressure using pressure transducer connected to LabView Fill to 12 mL ; Non-voiding contraction seen Fill to 13 mL ; Non-voiding contraction seen Fill to 16 mL ; Non-voiding contraction seen

steps.title: Test for device function
steps.instruction: Test for device function. Data is being sent wirelessly from the UroMOCA to the receiving radio

steps.title: Infuse 10mL of contrast (1:10 dilution)...
steps.instruction: Infuse 10mL of contrast (1:10 dilution) – Single CT image Infuse an additional 5mL of contrast (1:10 dilution) – Single CT image

steps.title: Fill bladder with saline at 2ml/minand...
steps.instruction: Fill bladder with saline at 2ml/minand record pressure using pressure transducer connected to LabView Fill to 15 mL ; Tug on catheter - large contraction

steps.title: Infuse 0
steps.instruction: Infuse 0.9% saline in boluses of 3mL, 6mL, 9mL, 12mL, 15mL at a rate of 10mL / minutes. UroMOCA transmitting data

steps.title: Infuse 1
steps.instruction: Infuse 1.5% saline in boluses of 3mL, 6mL, 9mL, 12mL, 15mL at a rate of 10mL / minutes. UroMOCA transmitting data

steps.title: Infuse 3
steps.instruction: Infuse 3.0% saline in boluses of 3mL, 6mL, 9mL, 12mL, 15mL at a rate of 10mL / minutes. UroMOCA transmitting data

steps.title: Infuse 1
steps.instruction: Infuse 1.5% saline in boluses of 3mL, 6mL, 9mL, 12mL, 15mL at a rate of 10mL / minutes. UroMOCA transmitting data

steps.title: Infuse 1
steps.instruction: Infuse 1.5% saline in boluses of 3mL, 6mL, 9mL, 12mL, 15mL at a rate of 10mL / minutes. UroMOCA transmitting data

steps.title: Infuse 3
steps.instruction: Infuse 3.0% saline in boluses of 3mL, 6mL, 9mL, 12mL, 15mL at a rate of 10mL / minutes. UroMOCA transmitting data

steps.title: Infuse 0
steps.instruction: Infuse 0.9% saline in boluses of 3mL, 6mL, 9mL, 12mL, 15mL at a rate of 10mL / minutes. UroMOCA transmitting data

steps.title: Infuse 3
steps.instruction: Infuse 3.0% saline in boluses of 3mL, 6mL, 9mL, 12mL, 15mL at a rate of 10mL / minutes. UroMOCA transmitting data

steps.title: Rotate animal on right side Infuse 0
steps.instruction: Rotate animal on right side Infuse 0.9% saline in boluses of 3mL, 6mL, 9mL, 12mL, 15mL at a rate of 10mL / minutes. UroMOCA transmitting data

steps.title: Bladder is removed and placed in formalin for histological analysis
steps.instruction: Bladder is removed and placed in formalin for histological analysis
